mapper.select: /** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeReqListCnt */ select count(1) from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id and uccr.creator_id = #{memberId}

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeReqList */ select a.* from( select ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , '[' || ubpa.receipt_no || '] ' || ubpd.task_nm_ko as task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , uccr.change_iem_div_cd /*협약변경항목구분*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CHANGE_IEM_DIV', uccr.change_iem_div_cd) as change_iem_div_nm /*협약변경항목구분명*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd /*협약변경상태*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_CHANGE_STTUS', uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd) as cnvn_change_sttus_nm /*협약변경상태명*/ , uccr.resn_cn /* 사유*/ , to_char(uccr.created_dt ,'yyyy-mm-dd') as req_de /*신청일*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_req_id /*협약변경요청ID*/ , uccr.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubpd.bsns_slctn_ID /*사업선정대상ID */ , row_number() over (order by uccr.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id and uccr.creator_id = #{memberId} ) a where 1=1 offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeBaseInfoFront */ select ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubp.bsns_bgnde /*사업시작일*/ , ubp.bsns_endde /*사업종료일*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubpd.task_nm_en /*과제명_영문*/ , ubpd.apply_field /*지원분야*/ , coalesce(ubpd.partcptn_company_cnt,0) as partcptn_company_cnt /** 참여기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.smlpz_cnt,0) as smlpz_cnt /** 중소기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.mspz_cnt,0) as mspz_cnt /** 중견기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.etc_cnt,0) as etc_cnt /** 기타수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.total_wct,0) as total_wct /** 총사업비 */ , uccr.change_iem_div_cd /*협약변경항목구분*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CHANGE_IEM_DIV', uccr.change_iem_div_cd) as change_iem_div_nm /*협약변경항목구분명*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd /*협약변경상태*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_CHANGE_STTUS', uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd) as cnvn_change_sttus_nm /*협약변경상태명*/ , uccr.resn_cn /* 사유*/ , case when uccr.created_dt is null then to_char(now() ,'yyyy-mm-dd') else to_char( uccr.created_dt ,'yyyy-mm-dd') end as req_de /*신청일*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_type_cd /*협약변경유형*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_CHANGE_TYPE', uccr.cnvn_change_type_cd) as cnvn_change_typenm /*협약변경유형명*/ , ubpd.member_id /*사업자(주관사ID)*/ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , uccr.cnvn_change_req_id /*협약변경요청ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id left outer join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id and uccr.change_iem_div_cd = #{changeIemDivCd} where 1=1 and ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/
and uccr.cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} /*협약변경요청ID*/

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeRegCnt */ select count(1) from uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ where 1=1 and uccr.cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} /*협약변경요청ID*/ and uccr.change_iem_div_cd = #{changeIemDivCd} /*협약변경항목구분*/ and uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd = #{cnvnChangeSttusCd} /*협약변경상태코드*/

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeReqListAdminCnt */ select count(1) from( select uccr.cnvn_change_req_id , (select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id where 1=1
and uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd = #{cnvnChangeSttusCd} /*협약변경상태*/
and uccr.cnvn_change_type_cd = #{cnvnChangeTypeCd} /*협약변경유형코드*/
and uccr.change_iem_div_cd = #{changeIemDivCd} /*협약변경항목구분명*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
) a where 1=1
and a.member_nm = #{memberNm} /*사업자명-이름*/

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectCnvnChangeBaseInfo */ select to_char(uccr.created_dt ,'yyyy-mm-dd') as req_de /*신청일*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd /*협약변경상태-처리상태*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_CHANGE_STTUS', uccr.cnvn_change_sttus_cd) as cnvn_change_sttus_nm /*협약변경상태명-처리상태*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko as task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_type_cd /*협약변경유형코드(G:CNVN_CHANGE_TYPE)*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_CHANGE_TYPE', uccr.cnvn_change_type_cd) as cnvn_change_type_nm /*협약변경유형코드*/ , uccr.change_iem_div_cd /*협약변경항목구분*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CHANGE_IEM_DIV', uccr.change_iem_div_cd) as change_iem_div_nm /*협약변경항목구분명*/ , ( select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*성명*/ , utr.rspnber_nm /*과제책임자명*/ , utr.enc_mbtlnum /*과제책임자명_휴대폰*/ , utr.enc_email /*과제책임자명_이메일*/ , utr.task_rspnber_id /** 과제책임자ID */ , coalesce(ubpd.partcptn_company_cnt,0) as partcptn_company_cnt /** 참여기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.smlpz_cnt,0) as smlpz_cnt /** 중소기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.mspz_cnt,0) as mspz_cnt /** 중견기업수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.etc_cnt,0) as etc_cnt /** 기타수 */ , coalesce(ubpd.total_wct,0) as total_wct /** 총사업비 */ , ubp.bsns_bgnde /*사업시작일*/ , ubp.bsns_endde /*사업종료일*/ , uccr.cnvn_change_req_id /*협약변경요청ID*/ , uccr.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubpd.bsns_slctn_ID /*사업선정대상ID */ , uccr.creator_id as applcnt_id /*변경신청자명 */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id left outer join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ where 1=1 and uccr.cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} /*협약변경요청ID*/ and uccr.change_iem_div_cd = #{changeIemDivCd} /*협약변경항목구분*/

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectProcessHistCnt */ select count(1) from( select ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko as task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , (select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , uccr.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id where 1=1
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*접수번호*/
) a where 1=1
and a.member_nm = #{memberNm} /*사업자명*/
group by a.receipt_no, a.task_nm_ko, a.bsns_year, a.bsns_nm, a.member_nm, a.bsns_cnvn_id

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectProcessHistBaseInfo */ select a.* from( select ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , (select cm.member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , uccr.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr /**협약변경요청*/ on ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = uccr.bsns_cnvn_id and uccr.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/ where 1=1 ) a where 1=1 group by a.receipt_no, a.task_nm_ko, a.bsns_year, a.bsns_nm, a.member_nm, a.bsns_cnvn_id

/** UsptCnvnChangeReqDao.selectChangeChangeIemDiv */ select uccr.cnvn_change_req_id /*협약변경요청ID*/ , uccr.change_iem_div_cd /*협약변경항목구분*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CHANGE_IEM_DIV', uccr.change_iem_div_cd) as change_iem_div_nm /*협약변경항목구분명*/ from uspt_cnvn_change_req uccr where uccr.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/ order by uccr.change_iem_div_cd
